sidebar.logOutDescription: You'll be signed out of your SiteSkies account.

appSettings.title: App Settings
appSettings.languageDescription: Choose the language for the app interface.

profile.title: Account Info
profile.subtitle: Your profile details.
profile.deleteWarning: This action is permanent and cannot be undone. All of your data will be deleted, including:
profile.deleteItem1: All your projects and weather forecasts
profile.deleteItem2: Your subscription (any active subscription will be canceled immediately)
profile.deleteNote: Note: billing records (past invoices and transactions) are retained by our payment processor for tax and audit purposes.
profile.passwordResetSent: Password reset email sent! Check your inbox.

team.title: Seats
team.subtitle: Invite people to your plan. Each seat is a separate SiteSkies account covered by your subscription.
team.onlyOwnerCanManage: Only the plan owner can invite and manage seats.
team.seatsMaxReached: You've used all {{max}} seats on your {{plan}} plan. Upgrade to add more.
team.statusPendingDesc: Waiting for them to sign in and accept.
team.statusAwaitingDesc: Accepted, but they had their own subscription. Joins your plan when theirs ends.

billing.title: Billing & Subscription
billing.subtitle: Manage your plan and billing details.
billing.paymentFailedDesc: Your most recent payment could not be processed. Please update your payment method to keep your subscription active.
billing.subscriptionActivated: 🎉 Subscription activated! Your plan has been upgraded to {{plan}}.
billing.activatingDelayed: ⚠️ Your payment was received but it's taking longer than usual to activate. Please refresh this page in a minute. If the problem persists, contact support.
billing.checkoutCanceled: Checkout was canceled. You haven't been charged.
billing.teamPlanNoteDesc: They cover the subscription. You have your own account and projects, just with their plan features.

usage.title: Usage
usage.subtitle: Your current usage across the {{plan}} plan.

legal.title: Legal
legal.subtitle: Terms of service and privacy policy.

feedback.title: Share Feedback
feedback.subtitle: Help us improve SiteSkies by sharing your thoughts.
feedback.placeholder: Tell us what's on your mind...

dashboard.title: Projects
dashboard.subtitle: Track weather conditions for your upcoming projects
dashboard.noProjectsSubtitle: Create your first project to start tracking weather.
dashboard.noMatchSubtitle: Try adjusting your filters or search.
dashboard.skippedFuture_one: {{count}} project skipped — forecast not available yet.
dashboard.skippedFuture_other: {{count}} projects skipped — forecast not available yet.

project.projectEnded: This project has already ended on {{date}}. Weather forecasts can no longer be updated.
project.forecastNotAvailable: Forecast not yet available. Your first forecast will be ready on {{date}}.
project.partialForecast: Showing forecast for {{shown}} of {{total}} project days. Full forecast available from {{date}}.
project.proceedDetail: Weather conditions look good for your project.
project.cautionDetail: Some weather concerns detected. Review the forecast.
project.postponeDetail: Significant weather issues detected. Consider postponing.
project.pendingDetail: No forecast checked yet. Click 'Check Weather' to get started.

newProject.title: New Project
newProject.subtitle: Set up your project details and weather requirements
newProject.weatherRequirementsSubtitle: Fields left blank impose no restriction on that condition.
newProject.limitReached: Project limit reached for your plan.
newProject.upgradeRequired: Upgrade your plan to create more projects.
newProject.limitReachedFull: You've reached the {{count}} project limit on the {{plan}} plan.

forecast.checkWeatherHint: Click "Check Weather" to load the forecast.

signal.details: {{bad}} of {{total}} forecasted days do not meet weather requirements.

weather.additionalPlaceholder: Any other weather conditions to watch for...
weather.evaluateWorkHoursOnlyDesc: Evaluate weather requirements only within the selected time window instead of the full day.

location.label: Location
location.latLngDisplay: Lat: {{lat}}, Lng: {{lng}} — drag the pin to adjust
